name: Zigzagfold
description: A pleated accordion of sheared panels alternating their lean, re-shading on reseed.

code.style: --rule: ( @random(${shapeFrequency}) { background: @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4), var(--color5)); } @match(@x % 2 == 0) { background: @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4), var(--color5)); -webkit-clip-path: polygon(0 0, 100% 20%, 100% 100%, 0 80%); clip-path: polygon(0 0, 100% 20%, 100% 100%, 0 80%); } -webkit-transition: ease 450ms; transition: ease 450ms; );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
